items.title: Government can seize private land to make way for new AI data center transmission lines, report says — takeovers could be implemented using eminent domain law when private citizens refuse to sell land
items.summary: Utilities can use eminent domain to seize private land for new transmission lines needed to power data centers, though public-use and state-law limits still apply.
items.title_original: Government can seize private land to make way for new AI data center transmission lines, report says — takeovers could be implemented using eminent domain law when private citizens refuse to sell land
items.title_en: Government can seize private land to make way for new AI data center transmission lines, report says — takeovers could be implemented using eminent domain law when private citizens refuse to sell land
items.title_bilingual: Government can seize private land to make way for new AI data center transmission lines, report says — takeovers could be implemented using eminent domain law when private citizens refuse to sell land
items.summary_zh: 公用事业公司可以利用征用权来征用私人土地，用于为数据中心供电所需的新输电线路，但公共使用和州法律限制仍然适用。

items.title: Samsung now supplying new VESA DisplayHDR True Black 1400 laptop displays — Lenovo, Asus, Dell, and MSI set to launch portables with the first 1,600 nits tandem OLED panels
items.summary: Samsung Display has announced that it is now supplying its first mass-produced VESA DisplayHDR True Black 1400 monitor panels to laptop makers including Lenovo, Asus, Dell, and MSI.

items.summary_zh: Samsung Display 宣布，现已向联想、华硕、戴尔和微星等笔记本电脑制造商供应首款量产的 VESA DisplayHDR True Black 1400 显示器面板。
